The [[Kuat Leisure]] '''121-B''' was an interstellar [[Yacht/Legends|yacht]] model. It was used during the time of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. One such yacht was the [[Flare (yacht)|''Flare'']].

{{Ship-stub}}
